title: Peruvian Authorities Grant Land for $11.2 Billion Hydrogen Initiative
content: The Arequipa regional government in Peru has allocated 160 hectares in Matarani for Verano Energy's $11.2bn Horizonte de Verano clean ammonia and hydrogen project. With environmental approval secured in March, the projectâ€™s first phase is set to begin operations in mid-2027. This strategic initiative aims to position Peru as a global player in renewable energy, supporting economic growth and decarbonization efforts. The project will leverage Matarani's access to maritime routes and is expected to create jobs, boost local infrastructure, and foster environmental sustainability.
author: Analysts Account
